# Total execution gas of this compiler's bytecode vs solc's for solidity-gas.
# Generated by scripts/UpdateCorpusGas.lean; re-pin with scripts/update-gas.sh.
# Pinned to solc 0.8.35, EVM version osaka. 'ours' is a ceiling:
# CI fails if this compiler's total rises above it while solc's is unchanged.
# columns: fixture<TAB>ours<TAB>solc
abiv2.sol	1686	1236
abiv2_optimised.sol	1686	1236
data_storage.sol	750	424
dispatch_large.sol	2934	2254
dispatch_large_optimised.sol	2934	2254
dispatch_medium.sol	1582	1142
dispatch_medium_optimised.sol	1582	1142
dispatch_small.sol	982	610
dispatch_small_optimised.sol	982	610
exp.sol	1062	708
exp_optimized.sol	1062	708
storage_costs.sol	958	600
